creator: support@bluegravity.com
text:
Blue Gravity http://www.bluegravity.com/index_bsd.php

Providing FreeBSD based web/email/database hosting since 1997. Dedicated, Semi-Dedicated, co-located, and virtual hosting solutions to fit any needs. Unlike many hosts, we custom build servers in house with the highest quality hardware to reduce costs and pass those savings on to you.
